heading: Bridging Strategy and Execution
subhead: I apply Lean Six Sigma, Agile, and ITIL frameworks to build resilient operations that scale effortlessly across global ICT sectors.

approach.title: Lean Efficiency
approach.desc: Identify structural waste and eliminate bottlenecks to increase team velocity by 15-20% consistently.

approach.title: Digital Transformation
approach.desc: Modernize tech stacks (S/4HANA, PEGA) with seamless API integrations and process automation.

approach.title: Change Management
approach.desc: Guiding global teams through complex cultural and technical transformations with strategic empathy.

approach.title: Workflow Optimization
approach.desc: Leveraging AI tools to optimize workflows and documentation processes.

approach.title: Standardization
approach.desc: Creating robust, scalable SOPs that remove operational ambiguity and enable rapid organizational scaling.

approach.title: Data Intelligence
approach.desc: Transforming raw operational metrics into actionable KPI dashboards for real-time decision-making.

expertise.title: Strategic Process Design
expertise.desc: Translating high-level business goals into executable, scalable process architectures (BPMN, VSM).

expertise.title: Digital Ecosystems
expertise.desc: Harmonizing complex IT landscapes (SAP, PEGA, API Layers) to reduce technical debt and improve velocity.

expertise.title: Continuous Improvement
expertise.desc: Deploying Lean Six Sigma and Agile frameworks to identify structural waste and optimize performance.

expertise.title: Change Enablement
expertise.desc: Leading cross-functional teams through cultural and operational shifts with clear communication and empathy.
